Federal Employee Benefits Planning

Specialized planning for FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and the unique benefits of federal employment.

Federal Benefits Are Complex

Your federal benefits package is one of the best in the country, but maximizing it requires specialized knowledge.

FERS
Pension System

Retirement Annuity

Understanding your FERS annuity calculation, special retirement provisions, and how to maximize your pension benefit.

TSP
Thrift Savings Plan

Investment Strategy

Optimizing your TSP allocation across L, C, S, I, F, and G funds based on your retirement timeline.

FEGLI
Life Insurance

Coverage Analysis

Evaluating whether FEGLI coverage makes sense as you approach retirement or if alternatives are more cost-effective.

Federal Benefits We Help Optimize

FERS Pension Planning

  • Annuity calculation and projections
  • Survivor benefit election analysis
  • Special retirement provisions (LEO, ATC, firefighter)
  • Voluntary early retirement (VERA/VSIP)
  • Disability retirement options
  • FERS supplement until age 62

TSP Management

  • Fund allocation optimization
  • Traditional vs. Roth TSP analysis
  • TSP rollover strategies at retirement
  • Withdrawal options and timing
  • TSP loan considerations
  • Lifecycle fund analysis

FEGLI Analysis

  • Basic vs. optional coverage analysis
  • Cost comparison at different ages
  • Private insurance alternatives
  • Post-retirement cost projections
  • Open season decision support

FEHB Health Benefits

  • Keeping FEHB into retirement
  • FEHB and Medicare coordination
  • Plan selection at retirement
  • Dental and vision options
  • Flexible spending accounts

Federal Retirement Planning Timeline

5yr

5 Years Before Retirement

Review high-3 salary calculations, maximize TSP contributions, evaluate FEGLI options.

2yr

2 Years Before Retirement

Confirm service computation dates, plan TSP withdrawal strategy, analyze survivor benefit options.

6mo

6 Months Before Retirement

Submit retirement application, coordinate FEHB continuation, finalize income plan.

Day 1

Retirement Day

Implement income strategy, begin TSP withdrawals if needed, coordinate all benefit payments.

Where Are You in Your Federal Career?

Planning for FERS Retirement?

5-10 years from retirement is the ideal time to start optimizing your federal benefits strategy. Don't leave money on the table.

Schedule a Review →

Maximizing Your TSP?

Are your TSP allocations aligned with your timeline and risk tolerance? Most federal employees leave significant growth on the table.

Get TSP Analysis →

Already Retired?

Optimize your withdrawal strategy, manage RMDs, and ensure your federal retirement income lasts throughout your lifetime.

Review Your Plan →

What Federal Employees Say

"I had no idea how much I was leaving on the table with my TSP allocations. They helped me restructure everything and I'm now on track to retire three years earlier than planned."

Michael R.

GS-14, Department of Defense

"The team understood FERS inside and out. They walked me through the FERS supplement, coordinated my Social Security timing, and helped me understand my FEHB options in retirement."

Sandra L.

GS-13, Department of Veterans Affairs

"After 30 years of federal service, I was overwhelmed by the decisions I had to make. They made it simple and gave me confidence that my retirement plan is solid."

James T.

GS-15, Department of Homeland Security

Federal Employee? Let's Optimize Your Benefits

Your federal benefits are valuable. Make sure you're getting the most from them.
